Using {remotes} directly from GitHub:

```{r}
#| label: installation-r
#| results: asis
glue(
  "
  ```r
  install.packages(\"remotes\")
  remotes::install_github(\"{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}\") # latest main commit
  remotes::install_github(\"{org_nm}/{pkg_nm}@v{ver}\") # specific version
  ",
  "```"
)
```
